c.f: CONCATENATE('100.Motherdata'!S26," Cents of Land & ",ROUND('100.Motherdata'!AF56,0), " SqFt of Building")

is.t: This road is exclusive used by the owner.
This road is used by the owner and another user.
This road is used by the owner and two other user.
This road is used by the owner and three other user.
This road is used by multiple users.
The plot has no access, making it landlocked. In this context, the value of the plot may reduced to 25% of the market value, making the property less marketable.
The property is in CRZ Zone-I as per the CRZ Notification-2011[Draft] . CRZ Zone-I is the most environmentally critical area; therefore, no construction activities are permitted in this zone.

The property is in CRZ Zone-II as per the CRZ Notification-2011 [Draft]. In this zone , Construction of buildings for various purposes is allowed only on the landward side of existing roads or authorized structures with further requlations in FSI. No construction is permitted on the landward side of new roads built on the seaward side of existing roads. In this context, the property is fairly marketable.

The property is in CRZ-Zone III (NDZ) as per the CRZ Notification-2011[Draft]. No construction is permitted within NDZ in CRZ III, except for repairs or reconstruction of existing authorised structure not exceeding existing Floor Space Index, existing plinth area and existing density and for permissible activities under this notification including facilities essential for activities and construction or reconstruction of dwelling units of traditional coastal communities including fisher folk, incorporating necessary disaster management provisions and proper sanitation arrangements. In this context, the property is poorly marketable.

The property is in CRZ-Zone III (200m to 500m) as per the CRZ Notification-2011[Draft]. In this zone Construction or reconstruction of dwelling units, so long it is within the ambit of traditional rights and customary uses such as existing fishing villages, etc. and building permission for such construction or reconstruction will be subject to local town and country planning rules, with an overall height of construction not exceeding 9 meters and with only two floors (ground + one floor). In this context, the property is fairly marketable.

c.f: CONCATENATE("The building falls under the ",B48," category, has ")
CONCATENATE("a coverage violation with an actual coverage of ",E53,"% exceeding the maximum allowed limit of ",E52,"%")
CONCATENATE(" and has FSI violation with an actual FSI of ",F53," exceeding the maximum allowed limit of ",F52,".")

is.t: * The building does not have any setback violation
* The building have setback violation with an

c.f: CONCATENATE("actual Front Side setback of ",C77,"m falling short of the minimum required limit of ",C76,"m,")
CONCATENATE("actual Rear-Side setback of ",D77,"m falling short of the minimum required limit of ",D76,"m,")
CONCATENATE("actual Side-1 setback of ",E77,"m falling short of the minimum required limit of ",E76,"m,")
CONCATENATE("actual Side-2 setback of ",F77,"m falling short of the minimum required limit of ",F76,"m.")
IF(G78=0,"","In this context,The area in violation has not been considered for valuation. The BUA has been reduced to avoid potential future conflicts arising from this non-compliance")

is.t: Part RCC and Part Tiled Roof [Mangalore Pattern]
Part RCC and Part Sheet Roof
Part Tiled Roof [Mangalore Pattern] and Part Sheet Roof
Part RCC, Part Tiled Roof [Mangalore Pattern] and Part Sheet Roof
Kaja Shoppinf Complex, Railway station Road, Aluva- 683101.
The guideline value and fair market value are within 20% of each other.
The guideline value and fair market value differ by more than 20% because the state government has not updated the current market rates.
Mr. Sooraj A S, Asst. Valuer
Ms.Treesa Neenu N P, Asst. Valuer
Mr. Uthpalendu S P, Asst. Valuer
